TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Félix Tshisekedi ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 6, Félix Tshisekedi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Congo, domocratic republic of the ta' misuw hya' ga Félix Tshisekedi, aring ryax tay 24 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Félix Tshisekedi minkahul sa Léopoldville na Congo, domocratic republic of the. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1963 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: **lix ts~ɕħis~ɕeke*i rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, **lix ts~ɕħis~ɕeke*i, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ʦ~ʨoŋo, *omoʦ~ʨratiʦ~ʨ repuβliʦ~ʨ o* tħe taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa **lix ts~ɕħis~ɕeke*i, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral **lix ts~ɕħis~ɕeke*i minkaħul s~ɕa l*opol**ille na ʦ~ʨoŋo, *omoʦ~ʨratiʦ~ʨ repuβliʦ~ʨ o* tħe. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Félix Tshisekedi ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 6, Félix Tshisekedi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Congo, domocratic republic of the ta' misuw hya' ga Félix Tshisekedi, aring ryax tay 24 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Félix Tshisekedi minkahul sa Léopoldville na Congo, domocratic republic of the. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1963 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ʦ~ʨoŋo, *omoʦ~ʨratiʦ~ʨ repuβliʦ~ʨ o* tħe taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa **lix ts~ɕħis~ɕeke*i, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral **lix ts~ɕħis~ɕeke*i minkaħul s~ɕa l*opol**ille na ʦ~ʨoŋo, *omoʦ~ʨratiʦ~ʨ repuβliʦ~ʨ o* tħe. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
